name: Meta Ads Management
description: Unleash high-converting Facebook, Instagram, and WhatsApp marketing campaigns tailored for local consumer markets. We build lead capture systems, design custom graphics and vertical video Reels, and write conversion-optimized copies that drive direct WhatsApp chats, store visits, and retail sales.
short_description: Convert social traffic into paying customers with optimized FB, Instagram & WhatsApp ad funnels.
benefits: Target high-intent local customer groups based on exact city behaviors.
Receive 10+ designer graphics and vertical video reels monthly.
Conversions API & Pixel integration setup included to track leads.
Daily campaign budget monitoring and continuous bid optimizations.

process_steps.title: Audit & Pixel Setup
process_steps.desc: Configure Meta Conversions API to bypass iOS ad blocks.

process_steps.title: Creative Design
process_steps.desc: Write localized copies and compile visual product images/reels.

process_steps.title: Launch & Target
process_steps.desc: Deploy custom target lookalike profiles in specified cities.

process_steps.title: Scaling & Optimization
process_steps.desc: Scale budgets once campaigns hit a stable 3X+ ROAS target.

faqs.question: What is the starting budget for Meta Ads in {city}?
faqs.answer: We recommend starting with a daily budget of ₹500 to ₹1,000 for your Meta campaigns in {city}. This allows the Meta algorithm to collect enough conversions data to optimize bidding.

faqs.question: Do you design the ad graphics and videos?
faqs.answer: Yes, all our plans include full ad creative services: high-converting copies, professional graphic cards, and video edits for Instagram Reels.

name: Google Ads Management
description: Capture customers at the exact moment they search for your products or services. Our Google Search and Performance Max campaigns target high-intent local keywords in your city, filtering out useless clicks to save your ad budget.
short_description: Intercept high-intent buyers with search ads, local map keywords, and display campaigns.
benefits: Rank #1 on Google for high-commercial local search terms.
Continuous negative keyword scrubbing to eliminate waste clicks.
Optimized Google Search and Performance Max setup.
Dynamic conversion tracking for call button clicks and map directions.

process_steps.title: Keyword Extraction
process_steps.desc: Extract localized search volume terms for your specific services.

process_steps.title: Landing Page Review
process_steps.desc: Optimize the lead form landing page to improve Google Quality Score.

process_steps.title: Search Ad Copywriting
process_steps.desc: Write clear headings, callouts, and location extensions.

process_steps.title: Daily Bidding Optimization
process_steps.desc: Optimize target cost-per-acquisition (tCPA) values.

faqs.question: How do you prevent wasted ad budget in {city}?
faqs.answer: We maintain a robust negative keyword list and configure tight location targeting in {city}. This ensures your ads are only shown to users physically searching within your delivery radius.

name: High-Speed Website Development
description: Get a world-class, lightning-fast business website built on Astro.js + Tailwind CSS. We optimize for high performance, accessibility, and SEO targets. Best of all: we use our Pay-After-Seeing model. You pay only after you approve the design.
short_description: Ultra-fast, mobile-responsive websites built using Astro.js with a Pay-After-Seeing model.
benefits: High Lighthouse performance targets for instant mobile loads.
Pay-After-Seeing model: Zero risk, review preview before paying.
On-page local SEO structures for city rankings.
Clean call-to-action buttons optimized for WhatsApp chat generation.

process_steps.title: Layout Blueprinting
process_steps.desc: Discuss target objectives and draft structure.

process_steps.title: Preview Build
process_steps.desc: Develop the complete preview website on a staging link.

process_steps.title: Client Approval
process_steps.desc: Show preview to client. Approve and release payment.

process_steps.title: Live Deployment
process_steps.desc: Register .in domain, activate SSL, and push site live.

faqs.question: Do I have to pay anything upfront for web design in {city}?
faqs.answer: No. Under our Pay-After-Seeing model, we build the complete website preview first. You only transfer the package price when you approve the design and we are ready to deploy it to your live domain in {city}.

benefits: Rank in the Google Maps Local 3-Pack.

Clean up consistent Name, Address, Phone (NAP) citations.

faqs.question: How long does GMB optimization take to show results in {city}?
faqs.answer: Most local business profiles in {city} show an increase in phone calls and map direction queries within 30 to 45 days of starting GMB citation and geotagging updates.

faqs.question: How often will you post on my social accounts in {city}?

name: Bodhi Drishti Research Reports

description: Professional research reports that reveal exactly what your competitors are doing, what your market wants, and how to dominate your industry. AI-powered intelligence delivered as premium consulting reports. From competitor ad analysis to full market intelligence — get the insights that transform your business decisions.

benefits: Know exactly what competitors are doing
Discover untapped market opportunities
Get a data-backed growth strategy
Save months of manual research
Professional PDF report with actionable insights
Expert consulting calls included
Industry-specific benchmarks and data

process_steps.title: Choose Your Report
process_steps.desc: Select from Chakshu, Divya Drishti, or Trikaldarshi based on depth.

process_steps.title: Deep Research & Analysis
process_steps.desc: We research your market, keywords, ads, and opportunities.

process_steps.title: Report Creation

process_steps.title: Presentation & Strategy
process_steps.desc: We walk you through every insight in a dedicated video call.

ideal_for: Businesses spending on ads without clarity
Business owners who want competitive edge

faqs.question: What tools do you use for research?
faqs.answer: We use professional intelligence platforms including Meta Ad Library, Google Ads Transparency Center, SEMrush, SimilarWeb, Google Trends, and proprietary analysis frameworks.

faqs.question: How long does the research take?
faqs.answer: Chakshu reports take 5 business days, Divya Drishti takes 10 business days, and Trikaldarshi takes 15 business days.

faqs.question: Is my business data kept confidential?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We sign NDAs if required. All research data is exclusively yours and never shared with competitors.

faqs.question: Can I get a sample report first?
faqs.answer: Yes. Contact us to receive a redacted sample report that shows the quality and format of our research deliverables.

faqs.question: What if I need changes to the report?
faqs.answer: Each report includes one round of revisions after the presentation call.

faqs.question: Do you also implement the recommendations?
faqs.answer: The report is intelligence-only, but we offer full implementation services. Report clients get 20% off any RoasBodhi service.

faqs.question: How is this different from free online tools?
faqs.answer: Free tools give raw data. We give you interpreted, contextualized, India-specific intelligence with specific action items for your business.
